metadata.description: KISA Korean Truncheon for Vulnerabilities — Secure coding guideline skills for vibe coders based on KISA Python Secure Coding Guide 2023. 47 CWE-mapped rules to audit, fix, check, and guide secure code.

plugins.name: kktv-en
plugins.description: KISA Korean Truncheon for Vulnerabilities (English). start(KISA 47-rule security audit), fix(auto-fix vulnerabilities), check(pre-deployment checklist), guide(secure coding prompt generator).

plugins.name: kktv-ko
plugins.description: KISA Korean Truncheon for Vulnerabilities (한국어). start(KISA 47개 규칙 보안 감사), fix(취약점 자동 수정), check(배포 전 체크리스트), guide(시큐어코딩 프롬프트 생성).
